name: MADE IN USA INC.
summary: Alixo-Yolloo Corporation, incorporated in Nevada in 2019, provides music-recognition services via its mobile application 'Alixo,' which identifies music tracks from short microphone-recorded samples using advanced neural network algorithms against a library of 50 million tracks. The company also offers an API rental service enabling third-party applications to integrate music recognition functionality. The app is available on Google Play and the API is accessible via alixo-yolloo.com.

products.name: Alixo
products.description: Mobile app that identifies music tracks from short audio samples recorded via microphone, available on Google Play.

products.name: API Rental Service
products.description: API allowing third-party music recognition and listening applications to integrate neural network-based music recognition functionality.

products.name: Proprietary Database
products.description: Neural network database matching recorded audio against a library of 50 million tracks, acquired August 2024.

origin.chain: SEC.gov PEM → origin.rootz.global extraction → GitHub mirror
